title: Column Header Freeze on Boards
excerpt: Please allow the column headers on Boards to freeze, so when items are collapsed, the summaries actually have a header.  It would help immensely, or at least make it an option.

posts.author: Carol_Hiscock (Carol Hiscock)
posts.cookedHtml: Please allow the column headers on Boards to freeze, so when items are collapsed, the summaries actually have a header. It would help immensely, or at least make it an option.
